case_title: WONG, MIMI VS SIMMONS,FRANKIE INDBA LIGHTS,CAMERA AND ACTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY WONG, MIMI AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS,FRANKIE INDBA LIGHTS,CAMERA AND ACTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1998 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S DECL:CHANGE DEFT'S NAME TO IND&DBA;&VENUE FROM"F"TO"A".
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS,FRANKIE INDBA LIGHTS,CAMERA AND ACTION
CORRESPONDENCE FROM FRANKIE SIMMONS, LIGHT CAMERA- ACTIONS FILED. RE: REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL ON GROUND FOR THE MEDIATION AND ARBITRATION.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-05-1998, OFF CALENDAR
ACTION IS STAYED. PARTIES TO MEDIATE/ARBITRATE BASED ON CLAUSE IN THE PLFT/DEFT CONRACT.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-22-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS,FRANKIE INDBA LIGHTS,CAMERA AND ACTION
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED;NOTICE MAILED TO PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, MIMI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIMMONS,FRANKIE INDBA LIGHTS,CAMERA AND ACTION PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO BY THEIR WRITTEN AGREEMENT TO MEDIATE THIS CONTROVERSY. PARTIES ARE TO USE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THEIR BEST TO MEDIATE, IF MEDIATION IS NOT SUCCESS FUL, CASE TO PROCEEDS TO BINDING ARBITRATION PER THE WRITTEN CONTRACT.
